scenario.name: RTP Echo pause / start test UAC
scenario.send:
NOTIFY sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];subid_ipcs=3546778592; transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Subscription-State: active;expires=2921 Event: dialog Content-Type: application/dialog-info+xml Content-Length: [len]
<?xml version="1.0"?> <dialog-info xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:dialog-info" xmlns:av="urn:avaya:xml:ns:ext:dialog-info" xmlns:sa="urn:avaya:xml:ns:ext:dialog-info" version="1" state="partial" entity="sips:6210@sip.boe.antenna.no10.gov.uk"> <dialog id="534240744" direction="recipient" call-id="534240744@172.19.69.8" local-tag="534240744lcltg" remote-tag="534240744rmtg"> <state>confirmed</state> <local> <identity display="4NetTestRB">sips:6210@sip.boe.antenna.no10.gov.uk</identity> <target uri="sips:6210@172.19.69.8:5061;transport=tls;gsid=8fd9f830-9669-11e9-983e-0050568e373f"> <param pname="+avaya-cm-line" pval="1"/> </target> </local> <remote> <identity display="Anonymous">sip:anonymous@sip.boe.antenna.no10.gov.uk</identity> <target uri="sip:anonymous@172.19.69.8:5061;transport=tls;gsid=8fd9f830-9669-11e9-983e-0050568e373f"/> </remote> </dialog> </dialog-info>
